title: senecio asperulus
intro: Senecio asperulus, also known as the prickly groundsel, is a type of flowering plant in the sunflower family (Asteraceae). Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce inflammation and act as a diuretic, due to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones and alkaloids. The health benefits of Senecio asperulus include its potential use in treating conditions such as arthritis, eczema, and urinary tract infections, as well as its ability to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and stems are often dried and used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are then used to harness its medicinal properties.
